/Users/majid/Ready/Apps/tests/personal/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -lembind -sEXPORT_NAME=libdggrid -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_main -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=ccall,cwrap -sASSERTIONS=0 -sINVOKE_RUN=0 -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sWASM=1 -sENVIRONMENT=webview -sFILESYSTEM=0 -sMINIMAL_RUNTIME=0 -sMODULARIZE=1 -sEXPORT_ES6=1 -sIGNORE_CLOSURE_COMPILER_ERRORS=0 -sWASM_BIGINT=1 -sBINARYEN_ASYNC_COMPILATION=1 -sDYNAMIC_EXECUTION=0 -sSTANDALONE_WASM=1 @CMakeFiles/libdggrid.dir/objects1.rsp -o libdggrid.js
